name: Caraway Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together except the beer.
2. Shape mixture into 6 patties, each about 1-inch thick.
3. Place the patties in an ungreased baking dish (10 x 6 x 1 3/4 inches).
4. Pour the beer over the patties.
5. Cover and refrigerate at least 3 hours. The meat may turn gray but is okay.
6. Remove patties from the marinade.
7. Broil or grill the patties, turning once, to the desired doneness for about 15 to 20 minutes.
